response.original_title: Selected Card Secrets by Jerry Sadowitz
response.overview: Jerry Sadowitz, one of Britain's foremost card magicians, reveals a carefully chosen collection of card secrets in this advanced instructional programme. Combining expert demonstrations with clear explanations, Sadowitz teaches a variety of impressive routines, sleights and techniques designed to develop confidence, dexterity and presentation. Intended for magicians looking to expand their repertoire, Selected Card Secrets offers a rare opportunity to learn from a true master of close-up magic.
response.title: Selected Card Secrets by Jerry Sadowitz
